text:
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub personal access token 'jeeves3' expires in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub personal access token 'jeevesagain' expires in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow 'Loop Monitor' failed on jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] Google Play: Google One subscription suspended due to declined payment.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert about a permanent failure due to a 429 rate-limit error in the Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert about a permanent failure due to a 429 rate-limit error in the Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report workflow run failed completely.
- [escalation] Spotify: Spotify payment failed and subscription is at risk.
- [reply needed] "Rob Collins & Esther Wakeman": Rob Collins and Esther Wakeman responding to scheduling thread, proposing lunch and asking for ticket printing and backpack delivery.
